set.xpath: /progression/perks/perk[@name='perkDeadEye' or @name='perkGunslinger' or @name='perkMachineGunner' or @name='perkArchery' or @name='perkPummelPete' or @name='perkSkullCrusher' or @name='perkMiner69r' or @name='perkJavelinMaster' or @name='perkGreaseMonkey']//passive_effect[@level='1,5']/@level

/progression/perks/perk[@name='perkDeadEye' or @name='perkGunslinger' or @name='perkMachineGunner' or @name='perkArchery' or @name='perkPummelPete' or @name='perkSkullCrusher' or @name='perkMiner69r' or @name='perkJavelinMaster' or @name='perkGreaseMonkey']//passive_effect[@level='1,2,3,4,5']/@level

/progression/perks/perk[@name='perkDeadEye' or @name='perkGunslinger' or @name='perkMachineGunner' or @name='perkArchery' or @name='perkPummelPete' or @name='perkSkullCrusher' or @name='perkMiner69r' or @name='perkJavelinMaster' or @name='perkGreaseMonkey']//triggered_effect/requirement[@name='ProgressionLevel'][@operation='Equals'][@value='1']/@value

/progression/perks/perk[@name='perkDeadEye' or @name='perkGunslinger' or @name='perkMachineGunner' or @name='perkArchery' or @name='perkPummelPete' or @name='perkSkullCrusher' or @name='perkMiner69r' or @name='perkJavelinMaster' or @name='perkGreaseMonkey']//triggered_effect/requirement[@name='ProgressionLevel'][@operation='Equals'][@value='2']/@value

/progression/perks/perk[@name='perkDeadEye' or @name='perkGunslinger' or @name='perkMachineGunner' or @name='perkArchery' or @name='perkPummelPete' or @name='perkSkullCrusher' or @name='perkMiner69r' or @name='perkJavelinMaster' or @name='perkGreaseMonkey']//triggered_effect/requirement[@name='ProgressionLevel'][@operation='Equals'][@value='3']/@value

/progression/perks/perk[@name='perkDeadEye' or @name='perkGunslinger' or @name='perkMachineGunner' or @name='perkArchery' or @name='perkPummelPete' or @name='perkSkullCrusher' or @name='perkMiner69r' or @name='perkJavelinMaster' or @name='perkGreaseMonkey']//triggered_effect/requirement[@name='ProgressionLevel'][@operation='Equals'][@value='4']/@value

/progression/perks/perk[@name='perkDeadEye' or @name='perkGunslinger' or @name='perkMachineGunner' or @name='perkArchery' or @name='perkPummelPete' or @name='perkSkullCrusher' or @name='perkMiner69r' or @name='perkJavelinMaster' or @name='perkGreaseMonkey']//triggered_effect/requirement[@name='ProgressionLevel'][@operation='Equals'][@value='5']/@value
